context: Tests that the agent detects task format violations (Npm without version), an empty dependsOn value for the CD stage, and produces an accurate syntax report with a corrected pipeline file.

checklist.name: Unversioned task format detected
checklist.description: syntax-report.md (or equivalent) flags the `task: Npm` entry (missing @version suffix) as a task format violation

checklist.name: Empty dependsOn detected
checklist.description: syntax-report.md flags the `dependsOn:` key with no value in the CD stage as a syntax error or schema violation

checklist.name: Task format corrected in output
checklist.description: In the corrected azure-pipelines.yml, the unversioned `task: Npm` entry is replaced with a versioned form (e.g., Npm@1)

checklist.name: dependsOn corrected in output
checklist.description: In the corrected azure-pipelines.yml, the CD stage dependsOn is either removed, set to CI, or given a valid value — no bare `dependsOn:` without a value

checklist.name: Location/context provided for each error
checklist.description: syntax-report.md identifies where each error occurs (e.g., stage name, job name, task name, or approximate line)

checklist.name: Correction explained
checklist.description: syntax-report.md explains the correction applied for each error, not just that an error exists
